failing_tests.description: List of failing tests with their error messages.

root_cause.description: Root cause analysis — the underlying bug or missing feature.

recommended_fix.description: Specific fix recommendation with file paths and line numbers.

files_to_modify.description: Comma-separated list of files that need changes.

recommended_focus.description: One-sentence summary of what the develop stage should focus on.

summary.description: 1-2 sentence summary of the analysis findings.
